name: crochet_hook_hint_packs
description: Three tiers of the identical turquoise crochet-hook-and-golden-yarn-loop hint token: one token; three tokens in a tidy fan; five tokens in a rich compact cluster. Quantity is unmistakable and richness scales.
prompt_extra: strict 3 by 1 sheet; identical token design in every cell; each cluster remains fully inside its cell with wide transparent margins; no text or count labels

variants.name: fan
variants.prompt_extra: orderly fan arrangements with clear individual silhouettes

variants.name: bundle
variants.prompt_extra: cozier bundled arrangements tied by one short cream yarn strand
